budget.policy: Use this packet first. Expand only listed specs/code/evidence when phase or stale revision requires exact source.

task.title: Subagent JSON worker contracts
task.summary: Define and implement compact JSON contracts for verifier, researcher, planner, architecture reviewer, and view auditor subagents.

goal.outcome: Context-heavy or bias-sensitive CodeWiki work can run in fresh subagent sessions and return bounded results to the parent agent.
acceptance: Verifier, researcher, planner, architecture reviewer, and view auditor roles have documented input/output contracts.
Parent agent remains responsible for canonical writes.
Subagent outputs are compact JSON with pass/fail/block or proposal semantics as appropriate.
Existing fresh verifier behavior aligns with the shared subagent model.
non_goals: Let subagents freely mutate `.wiki` canonical truth.
Replace all parent-agent work with subagents.

delta.current: Fresh verifier exists, but broader subagent roles and contracts are underexplored.
delta.closure: Contracts and at least one additional subagent workflow are implemented or stubbed with tests.

specs.title: CodeWiki v2 Operating Model
specs.summary: Agreed v2 model for canonical truth, views, memory use, subagents, heartbeat, optional runtime tools, and sanitation.

specs.title: Context Memory Flow
specs.summary: How CodeWiki chooses between session RAM, views, canonical knowledge, subagents, and optional bounded context tools.
